name: volcengine-ddos
description: OctoBus package for Volcengine DDoS Protection read-only and audit query APIs.

Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/GetBasic.name: get-basic-alarm
Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/GetBasic.description: Query Volcengine DDoS basic protection attack alarms.

Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/AdvDefen.name: adv-defence-desc-instance-list
Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/AdvDefen.description: Query Volcengine DDoS advanced protection instances.

Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/AdvDefen.name: adv-defence-desc-attack-event
Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/AdvDefen.description: Query Volcengine DDoS advanced protection attack events.

Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/AdvDefen.name: adv-defence-get-web-def-attack-log
Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/AdvDefen.description: Query Volcengine DDoS advanced protection web attack logs.

Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/OriginDe.name: origin-defence-desc-instance-list
Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/OriginDe.description: Query Volcengine DDoS native protection instances.

Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/OriginDe.name: origin-defence-desc-attack-event
Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/OriginDe.description: Query Volcengine DDoS native protection attack events.

Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/InvokeRe.name: invoke-read-only-action
Volcengine_DDoS.Volcengine_DDoS/InvokeRe.description: Invoke an allowed Volcengine DDoS read-only action.
